    • randomValue

      default int randomValue()
      Given a histogram return a random variate from the distribution described it.
      Returns:
      The selected value.

    • randomValue

      default int randomValue(Random rand, int max)
      Given a histogram return a random variate from the distribution described it.
      Parameters:
      rand - The random number generator
      max -
      Returns:
      The random variate or 0 if out of range.

    • ksStatistic

      default double ksStatistic(Histogram that, double[] scales)
      Compute the Two-sample Kolmogorov–Smirnov test statistic of this histograms compared to that histogram. Assumes bucket sizes are small enough to ensure an accurate estimate (@see https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kolmogorov%E2%80%93Smirnov_test#Two-sample_Kolmogorov%E2%80%93Smirnov_test)
      Parameters:
      that - The second histogram
      scales - If non-null, a place to put the scale values (sample sizes) for h1 and h2
      Returns:
      The KS test statistic
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the bucket sizes are not the same in each histogram

    • ksCriticalValue

      default double ksCriticalValue(double alpha, double m, double n)
      Compute the critical value for the specified alpha level with two sample KS test
      Parameters:
      alpha - The alpha level
      m - Number of samples in first set
      n - Number of samples in second set
      Returns:
      The critical value of the KS statistic at the specified Alpha level

    • ksCriticalValue

      default double ksCriticalValue(double alpha, double[] sizes)
      Compute the critical value for the specified alpha level with two sample KS test
      Parameters:
      alpha - The alpha level
      sizes - An array giving sizes of first and second set
      Returns:
      The critical value of the KS statistic at the specified Alpha level

    • _toString

      default String _toString()
